# Hotel Capital Stack

> Is your hotel's debt an operations problem, a refinance problem, or a capital-stack problem? A free, confidential diagnostic that tells you where the problem is and what to do.

One confidential diagnostic scans every angle — coverage, leverage, maturity, rate, capex, the stack, and your exposure — and tells you where it hurts and what to do next.

## Key pages
- Home: https://myhoteldebt.com/
- Free hotel debt diagnostic tool: https://myhoteldebt.com/diagnostic.html

## What this site covers
- The stack is an order of who gets paid
- The numbers that tell you the truth
- Where the real problem usually hides

## About
A Modern Hospitality Solutions service — independent hotel debt, capital, and commercial advisory for hotel owners.
